title: Nursery Rhyme. CCLXXVIII. Games.
content:
[A game of the Fox. In a children's game, where all the little actors are seated in a circle, the following stanza is used as question and answer.]

        Who goes round my house this night?
            None but cruel Tom!
        Who steals all the sheep at night?
            None but this poor one.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCLXXVIII. Games.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
